en: Our third speaker is Dimitra Dantageliou
She is a psychologist a professor of photography
she has worked for 10 years in the TV and in the media and then she decided to move to a small
village in Pelion like the Galatian village that the Romans do not understand
and from there she lives in the center of things through re
centering That is she has made her own website www psychi gr
in which she provides the service of mental health to people as well as the magazine
for some time now in which she has clients in Europe and America
